changes.value:
Rewrite coreml_test.rs and verify all ane-embedding tests pass with non-zero embeddings.

- [ ] Rewrite coreml_test.rs to use objc2-core-ml directly (no coreml-rs, no ndarray)
- [ ] integration_test.rs needs no changes (uses public API)
- [ ] cargo test -p ane-embedding (unit tests)
- [ ] cargo test -p ane-embedding --test coreml_test (both pass, non-zero embeddings)
- [ ] cargo test -p ane-embedding --test integration_test (all 8 pass)
- [ ] cargo clippy -p ane-embedding -- -D warnings (clean)
- [ ] Verify embedding sum is non-zero (baseline: ~1895 from Python coremltools)
Rewrite tests and verify all pass
